orchestrations.task: Coordinate implementation of RuView/RuvSense production observability and config validation. Roles: sparc-planner updates docs/sprints/ruview-professionalization-stability/implementation_plan.md with final metric/config schema decisions; sparc-coder implements server config-file loading, all-v2 validation, Prometheus metrics, and LOG_FORMAT=json; tester identifies focused tests and full gates. Return concise handoff notes only; do not mutate files independently.
